description: LTSC discipline: dependency updates land as tidy PRs grouped by ecosystem, with stability windows so we don't ride bleeding edges.

schedule: before 8am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: Cargo workspace updates — group by package manifest so reviewers see related bumps together.
Bun/npm package updates — group operator and singbox-core together.
Docker base images — separate group, longer release-age delay because base-image regressions are painful.
GitHub Actions — pinned by SHA where possible.
Major upgrades require human review and a CHANGELOG entry. Don't auto-merge.
Pinned upstream tags in manifests/ — these are LTSC pins; don't touch them automatically.
